Yeah, so apartment IQ, we have been collecting 100 public available data for the last 5 years.
Our tool essentially has 3 different functionalities.
One of them is gonna be for like the day to day operations where you're getting a live data, feed into your assets as well as your competitors that you're tracking.
So when you log into the platform, you're able to see where your units and floor plans sit within each specific Comp set that you're tracking for each of your assets.
We also have a functionality called Research, where, in a matter of a few clicks, if you type in an address or a cross street, or anything like that.
You can spin up these custom market surveys in a matter of seconds.
So it's really great for acquisitions and development, or just taking a look at some different assets that you may not manage.
And the last functionality is called explore.
It's a top down approach where you can take a look at any sort of market and or sub market in the United States.
and we'll give you a 30 day snapshot of a lot of different insights there, as well as some historicals up to 3 years.
